claim: Existential concepts show 100% cross-architecture sign agreement (4/4 layer pairs)
notes: 500 quantum-random permutations. 33% of random relabelings produce same result. 81% produce 100% in some class. Small-sample artifact.

claim: Deeper layers show higher cross-architecture sign agreement than shallow layers
notes: This claim is about ALL prompts, not class-specific. Needs separate test. May survive because depth gradient is prompt-independent.

claim: SGP phase values for existential prompts are significantly different from zero within individual models
notes: 3 of 4 GPT-2 existential layer-pair means were indistinguishable from zero (p>0.05). Sign agreement between zeros is meaningless.
